transcript: buff. You know how apart from AD and crit, it also increases the crit damage you do? Well, that got increased from 40% bonus crit damage to 50% bonus crit damage. So when you buy Infinity Edge, instead of now doing 215% damage with crits, you will do 225% which is quite noticeable. It's going to be very useful on AD carries like Jhin or Draven, but also on the wind bros Yasuo and Yone of course.
